description: Style Note For the man who is smart enough to prefer quality along with a sporty feel, this pair from red tape is the right choice. Wear this with washed black jeans from wrangler and your favourite T-shirt, a perfect off-duty ensemble to wear for a coffee date in the evening. Product Details Synthetic leather upper with contrasting overlay lining along the midfoot and back foot Overlays on the toe box, midfoot and collar Central lacing system Padded tongue for comfort Padded sockliner Durable TPU outsole with arrow shaped lugs Material and Care Synthetic leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
